sentences.translation: Majka je rekla svom sinu: «Ko se trudi, naći će».
sentences.translationEn: The mother said to her son: «Whoever works hard will find».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ الْعَمَلَ الْجَادَّ يُؤَدِّي إِلَى النَّجَاحِ.
sentences.translation: To znači da ozbiljan rad vodi ka uspjehu.
sentences.translationEn: This means that hard work leads to success.

sentences.arabic: دَرَسَ سَامِيٌّ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ وَلَمْ يَتَوَقَّفْ.
sentences.translation: Sami je učio svaki dan i nije prestajao.
sentences.translationEn: Sami studied every day and did not stop.

sentences.translation: Uspio je na ispitu i veoma se obradovao.
sentences.translationEn: He passed the exam and was very happy.
